zh.Blickling, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可布利可林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Fortescue於大約1406年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親John Fortescue34歲，母親Clarice33歲。他於1436年與Lady Alice de Windsor在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1455年5月22日在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.Blickling, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可布利可林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Fortescue于大约1406年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲John Fortescue34岁，母亲Clarice33岁。他于1436年与Lady Alice de Windsor在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1455年5月22日在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fortescue
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French fort ‘strong’ + escu ‘shield’.
History: A family of this name claim descent from Radulfus Fortescu who is recorded in Domesday Book (1086) as holding lands at Modbury (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Fortescue was born about 1406, in Devon, England, his father, John Fortescue, was 34 and his mother, Clarice, was 33. He married Lady Alice de Windsor in 1436, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 May 1455, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Fortescue est né environ 1406, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Fortescue, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Clarice, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice de Windsor en 1436, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1455, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Fortescue um 1406 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fortescue 34 und seine Mutter Clarice 33. Er hat 1436 in England, United Kingdom Lady Alice de Windsor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Mai 1455 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Fortescue è nato il circa 1406 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, John Fortescue, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Clarice, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice de Windsor nel 1436, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 maggio 1455, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Blickling, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクブリックリング
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Fortescueが約1406年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父John Fortescueは34歳，母Clariceは33歳であった。1436年にイギリスイギリスでLady Alice de Windsorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1455年5月22日に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Fortescue(이)가 대략 1406년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fortescue(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Clarice(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1436년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Alice de Windsor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년 5월 22일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Fortescue nasceu aproximadamente 1406, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fortescue, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Clarice, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice de Windsor em 1436, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1455, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Fortescue родился около 1406 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Fortescue было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Clarice, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice de Windsor в 1436 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 мая 1455 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Fortescue nació aproximadamente 1406, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fortescue, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Clarice, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Lady Alice de Windsor en 1436, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1455, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
